headline: Apple Is Building AI Glasses To Beat Meta
summary: No screen. Just AI, cameras, and Siri. 4 designs. Premium acetate. Ships 2027.
body:
Apple is reportedly developing AI-powered smart glasses designed to compete directly with Meta's Ray-Ban AI glasses.

Unlike the Vision Pro, these will have no display at all. Instead, they'll rely entirely on AI processing: cameras, Siri integration, and ambient computing. Four frame styles are planned with premium acetate construction.

The $499 starting price positions them as premium-but-accessible — significantly cheaper than Vision Pro. A 2027 launch window gives Apple time to refine the AI stack.

headline: Google Gemma 4: Free AI That Lives On Your Phone
summary: Runs locally. Chats never saved. No cloud. Free on iOS and Android right now.
body:
Google has released Gemma 4, its most capable on-device AI model — and it's free on both iOS and Android.

Everything runs locally. Your conversations never leave your device, never hit a server, never get stored. 4x faster than the previous version, 60% less battery usage. Available on 140 million Android devices at launch.
